[Signal to Geometry Square (standalone).html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/29147629/Signal.to.Geometry.Square.standalone.html)
# CODING AGENTS: READ THIS FIRST

This is a **handoff bundle** from Claude Design (claude.ai/design).

A user mocked up designs in HTML/CSS/JS using an AI design tool, then exported this bundle so a coding agent can implement the designs for real.

## What you should do — IMPORTANT

**Read the chat transcripts first.** There are 3 chat transcript(s) in `chats/`. The transcripts show the full back-and-forth between the user and the design assistant — they tell you **what the user actually wants** and **where they landed** after iterating. Don't skip them. The final HTML files are the output, but the chat is where the intent lives.

**Read `project/CorVista Website.html` in full.** The user had this file open when they triggered the handoff, so it's almost certainly the primary design they want built. Read it top to bottom — don't skim. Then **follow its imports**: open every file it pulls in (shared components, CSS, scripts) so you understand how the pieces fit together before you start implementing.

**If anything is ambiguous, ask the user to confirm before you start implementing.** It's much cheaper to clarify scope up front than to build the wrong thing.

## About the design files

The design medium is **HTML/CSS/JS** — these are prototypes, not production code. Your job is to **recreate them pixel-perfectly** in whatever technology makes sense for the target codebase (React, Vue, native, whatever fits). Match the visual output; don't copy the prototype's internal structure unless it happens to fit.

**Don't render these files in a browser or take screenshots unless the user asks you to.** Everything you need — dimensions, colors, layout rules — is spelled out in the source. Read the HTML and CSS directly; a screenshot won't tell you anything they don't.

## Bundle contents

- `README.md` — this file
- `chats/` — conversation transcripts (read these!)
- `project/` — the `CorVista Website` project files (HTML prototypes, assets, components)

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8">
  <title>Bundled Page</title>
  <style>
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    body { background: #faf9f5; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 100vh; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; }
    #__bundler_loading { position: fixed; bottom: 20px; right: 20px; font: 13px/1.4 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; color: #666; background: #fff; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); z-index: 10000; }
    #__bundler_thumbnail { position: fixed; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #faf9f5; z-index: 9999; }
    #__bundler_thumbnail svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; }
    #__bundler_placeholder { color: #999; font-size: 14px; }
  </style>
  <noscript>
    <style>#__bundler_loading { display: none; }</style>
    <div style="position:fixed;bottom:12px;left:12px;font:13px/1.4 -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,sans-serif;color:#999;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.9);padding:6px 12px;border-radius:6px;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);z-index:10000;">
      This page requires JavaScript to display.
    </div>
  </noscript>
</head>
<body>
  <div id="__bundler_thumbnail">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <rect width="100" height="100" fill="#0E1F33"></rect>
    <g fill="none" stroke="#5DB4E8" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round">
      <path d="M34 50 q5 -16 14 -2 q4 7 8 -10 q5 14 10 1" opacity="0.5"></path>
      <path d="M40 36 q14 -4 18 12 q-2 16 -16 12 q-12 -6 -6 -18 q4 -8 16 -4" opacity="0.95"></path>
    </g>
  </svg>
</div>
  <div id="__bundler_loading">Unpacking...</div>

  <script>
    
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', async function() {
  const loading = document.getElementById('__bundler_loading');
  function setStatus(msg) { if (loading) loading.textContent = msg; }

  // Error sink persists across replaceWith since it's on window, not the DOM.
  window.addEventListener('error', function(e) {
    var p = document.body || document.documentElement;
    var d = document.getElementById('__bundler_err') || p.appendChild(document.createElement('div'));
    d.id = '__bundler_err';
    d.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;bottom:12px;left:12px;right:12px;font:12px/1.4 ui-monospace,monospace;background:#2a1215;color:#ff8a80;padding:10px 14px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #5c2b2e;z-index:99999;white-space:pre-wrap;max-height:40vh;overflow:auto';
    d.textContent = (d.textContent ? d.textContent + String.fromCharCode(10) : '') +
      '[bundle] ' + (e.message || e.type) +
      (e.filename ? ' (' + e.filename.slice(0, 60) + ':' + e.lineno + ')' : '');
  }, true);

  try {
    const manifestEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/manifest"]');
    const templateEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/template"]');
    if (!manifestEl || !templateEl) {
      setStatus('Error: missing bundle data');
      console.error('[bundler] Missing script tags — manifestEl:', !!manifestEl, 'templateEl:', !!templateEl);
      return;
    }

    const manifest = JSON.parse(manifestEl.textContent);
    let template = JSON.parse(templateEl.textContent);

    const uuids = Object.keys(manifest);
    setStatus('Unpacking ' + uuids.length + ' assets...');

    const blobUrls = {};
    await Promise.all(uuids.map(async (uuid) => {
      const entry = manifest[uuid];
      try {
        const binaryStr = atob(entry.data);
        const bytes = new Uint8Array(binaryStr.length);
        for (let i = 0; i < binaryStr.length; i++) bytes[i] = binaryStr.charCodeAt(i);

        let finalBytes = bytes;
        if (entry.compressed) {
          if (typeof DecompressionStream !== 'undefined') {
            const ds = new DecompressionStream('gzip');
            const writer = ds.writable.getWriter();
            const reader = ds.readable.getReader();
            writer.write(bytes);
            writer.close();
            const chunks = [];
            let totalLen = 0;
            while (true) {
              const { done, value } = await reader.read();
              if (done) break;
              chunks.push(value);
              totalLen += value.length;
            }
            finalBytes = new Uint8Array(totalLen);
            let offset = 0;
            for (const chunk of chunks) { finalBytes.set(chunk, offset); offset += chunk.length; }
          } else {
            console.warn('DecompressionStream not available, asset ' + uuid + ' may not render');
          }
        }

        blobUrls[uuid] = URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([finalBytes], { type: entry.mime }));
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Failed to decode asset ' + uuid + ':', err);
        blobUrls[uuid] = URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([], { type: entry.mime }));
      }
    }));

    const extResEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/ext_resources"]');
    const extResources = extResEl ? JSON.parse(extResEl.textContent) : [];
    const resourceMap = {};
    for (const entry of extResources) {
      if (blobUrls[entry.uuid]) resourceMap[entry.id] = blobUrls[entry.uuid];
    }

    setStatus('Rendering...');
    for (const uuid of uuids) template = template.split(uuid).join(blobUrls[uuid]);

    // Strip integrity + crossorigin — blob URLs from a file:// document inherit
    // a null origin, so crossorigin forces a CORS fetch that SRI then rejects.
    // The manifest bytes are ours; SRI protects against CDN compromise, not this.
    template = template.replace(/\s+integrity="[^"]*"/gi, '').replace(/\s+crossorigin="[^"]*"/gi, '');

    const resourceScript = '<script>window.__resources = ' +
      JSON.stringify(resourceMap).split('</' + 'script>').join('<\\/' + 'script>') +
      ';</' + 'script>';
    // Inject after <head> so the DOCTYPE stays first; prepending the script
    // would push the parser into quirks mode. DOMParser always emits a <head>
    // (synthesizing one if the source HTML omitted it) but may carry
    // attributes through, so match the full opening tag. slice() rather than
    // replace() keeps us clear of $-pattern substitution in resourceScript.
    const headOpen = template.match(/<head[^>]*>/i);
    if (headOpen) {
      const i = headOpen.index + headOpen[0].length;
      template = template.slice(0, i) + resourceScript + template.slice(i);
    }

    // Parse the template and swap the root element. Scripts inserted via
    // DOMParser/replaceWith are inert per spec — re-create each with
    // createElement so they execute, awaiting onload for src scripts to
    // preserve ordering (React before ReactDOM before Babel before text/babel).
    const doc = new DOMParser().parseFromString(template, 'text/html');
    document.documentElement.replaceWith(doc.documentElement);
    const dead = Array.from(document.scripts);
    for (const old of dead) {
      const s = document.createElement('script');
      for (const a of old.attributes) s.setAttribute(a.name, a.value);
      s.textContent = old.textContent;
      // text/babel scripts with a src: fetch and inline. transformScriptTags
      // does XHR against the src, but blob:null/ from a file:// origin is
      // silently dropped. Inlining makes it a plain inline babel script,
      // which transformScriptTags handles unconditionally.
      if ((s.type === 'text/babel' || s.type === 'text/jsx') && s.src) {
        const r = await fetch(s.src);
        s.textContent = await r.text();
        s.removeAttribute('src');
      }
      const p = s.src ? new Promise(function(r) { s.onload = s.onerror = r; }) : null;
      old.replaceWith(s);
      if (p) await p;
    }
    // Babel standalone auto-transforms type=text/babel on DOMContentLoaded,
    // which fired before we swapped the document. Trigger manually if present.
    if (window.Babel && typeof window.Babel.transformScriptTags === 'function') {
      window.Babel.transformScriptTags();
    }
  } catch (err) {
    setStatus('Error unpacking: ' + err.message);
    console.error('Bundle unpack error:', err);
  }
});

  </script>

url(\"3bbc5ea7-47e4-4225-aecc-97b4c1de8cfe\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0370-0377, U+037A-037F, U+0384-038A, U+038C, U+038E-03A1, U+03A3-03FF;\n}\n/* vietnamese */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Manrope';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 800;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"6651395b-2a50-43e9-8604-1de06fb4ab8e\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0102-0103, U+0110-0111, U+0128-0129, U+0168-0169, U+01A0-01A1, U+01AF-01B0, U+0300-0301, U+0303-0304, U+0308-0309, U+0323, U+0329, U+1EA0-1EF9, U+20AB;\n}\n/* latin-ext */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Manrope';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 800;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"a3843a40-27ac-43b2-9cd5-7f8d6052dae4\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0100-02BA, U+02BD-02C5, U+02C7-02CC, U+02CE-02D7, U+02DD-02FF, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+1D00-1DBF, U+1E00-1E9F, U+1EF2-1EFF, U+2020, U+20A0-20AB, U+20AD-20C0, U+2113, U+2C60-2C7F, U+A720-A7FF;\n}\n/* latin */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Manrope';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 800;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"ec6b199e-38af-459d-848f-ff238a0c51b6\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n/* latin-ext */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Sora';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 300;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"93039e01-0e27-4511-9f14-473a39c5efba\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0100-02BA, U+02BD-02C5, U+02C7-02CC, U+02CE-02D7, U+02DD-02FF, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+1D00-1DBF, U+1E00-1E9F, U+1EF2-1EFF, U+2020, U+20A0-20AB, U+20AD-20C0, U+2113, U+2C60-2C7F, U+A720-A7FF;\n}\n/* latin */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Sora';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 300;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"1fcf32f9-ca67-45f1-ab64-223bcdc6234c\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n/* latin-ext */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Sora';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"93039e01-0e27-4511-9f14-473a39c5efba\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0100-02BA, U+02BD-02C5, U+02C7-02CC, U+02CE-02D7, U+02DD-02FF, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+1D00-1DBF, U+1E00-1E9F, U+1EF2-1EFF, U+2020, U+20A0-20AB, U+20AD-20C0, U+2113, U+2C60-2C7F, U+A720-A7FF;\n}\n/* latin */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Sora';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"1fcf32f9-ca67-45f1-ab64-223bcdc6234c\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n/* latin-ext */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Sora';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"93039e01-0e27-4511-9f14-473a39c5efba\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0100-02BA, U+02BD-02C5, U+02C7-02CC, U+02CE-02D7, U+02DD-02FF, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+1D00-1DBF, U+1E00-1E9F, U+1EF2-1EFF, U+2020, U+20A0-20AB, U+20AD-20C0, U+2113, U+2C60-2C7F, U+A720-A7FF;\n}\n/* latin */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Sora';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"1fcf32f9-ca67-45f1-ab64-223bcdc6234c\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n/* latin-ext */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Sora';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"93039e01-0e27-4511-9f14-473a39c5efba\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0100-02BA, U+02BD-02C5, U+02C7-02CC, U+02CE-02D7, U+02DD-02FF, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+1D00-1DBF, U+1E00-1E9F, U+1EF2-1EFF, U+2020, U+20A0-20AB, U+20AD-20C0, U+2113, U+2C60-2C7F, U+A720-A7FF;\n}\n/* latin */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Sora';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"1fcf32f9-ca67-45f1-ab64-223bcdc6234c\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n/* latin-ext */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Sora';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"93039e01-0e27-4511-9f14-473a39c5efba\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0100-02BA, U+02BD-02C5, U+02C7-02CC, U+02CE-02D7, U+02DD-02FF, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+1D00-1DBF, U+1E00-1E9F, U+1EF2-1EFF, U+2020, U+20A0-20AB, U+20AD-20C0, U+2113, U+2C60-2C7F, U+A720-A7FF;\n}\n/* latin */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Sora';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"1fcf32f9-ca67-45f1-ab64-223bcdc6234c\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n/* latin-ext */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Sora';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 800;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"93039e01-0e27-4511-9f14-473a39c5efba\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0100-02BA, U+02BD-02C5, U+02C7-02CC, U+02CE-02D7, U+02DD-02FF, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+1D00-1DBF, U+1E00-1E9F, U+1EF2-1EFF, U+2020, U+20A0-20AB, U+20AD-20C0, U+2113, U+2C60-2C7F, U+A720-A7FF;\n}\n/* latin */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Sora';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 800;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"1fcf32f9-ca67-45f1-ab64-223bcdc6234c\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n\n\n:root {\n  /* ---------- Brand Core ----------\n     CorVista uses a tight palette: a deep navy ink, a single\n     bright sky blue, a warm parchment for editorial moments,\n     and a near-white slate for product / deck backgrounds. */\n\n  --cv-ink:            #212935;   /* primary ink — wordmark + headlines on light */\n  --cv-ink-deep:       #0E1F33;   /* deeper navy used as a full-bleed background */\n  --cv-ink-deepest:    #081627;   /* dropdown/modal backdrops on dark surfaces */\n\n  --cv-sky:            #5DB4E8;   /* primary brand blue — the \"V\" mark, \"HEALTH\" */\n  --cv-sky-bright:     #7CC3EF;   /* slightly lifted sky for hover/emphasis on dark */\n  --cv-sky-soft:       #BFE0F4;   /* tinted pills, soft surfaces on dark */\n  --cv-sky-wash:       #E6F2FB;   /* light callout / chart fill on light */\n\n  --cv-parchment:      #F4EFE6;   /* editorial cream — used in posters */\n  --cv-parchment-deep: #ECE4D2;   /* parchment hover / divider */\n\n  --cv-slate-bg:       #F2F4F7;   /* deck + product background */\n  --cv-slate-100:      #E5E9EE;\n  --cv-slate-200:      #CFD5DD;\n  --cv-slate-300:      #A6AEBA;\n  --cv-slate-400:      #6B7686;\n  --cv-slate-500:      #4A5462;\n\n  --cv-white:          #FFFFFF;\n\n  /* ---------- Semantic accents (use sparingly) ---------- */\n  --cv-gold:           #F3B51A;   /* big-dollar callouts (\"$1.8T\") */\n  --cv-coral:          #D85528;   /* \"THE PROBLEM\" labels, urgency stats */\n  --cv-green:          #2BC48A;   /* affirmative checks, \"Improved\" markers */\n\n  /* ---------- Functional tokens ----------\n     Most surfaces map to these — prefer them over raw brand\n     colors so dark/light variants stay consistent. */\n\n  --cv-fg-1:           var(--cv-ink);          /* primary text on light */\n  --cv-fg-2:           var(--cv-slate-500);    /* secondary text on light */\n  --cv-fg-3:           var(--cv-slate-400);    /* meta / captions on light */\n  --cv-fg-on-dark-1:   var(--cv-white);        /* primary text on navy */\n  --cv-fg-on-dark-2:   #BFCBD8;                /* secondary text on navy */\n  --cv-fg-on-dark-3:   #7A8898;                /* meta on navy */\n  --cv-accent:         var(--cv-sky);          /* eyebrows, links, highlights */\n\n  --cv-bg-base:        var(--cv-slate-bg);     /* page background */\n  --cv-bg-surface:     var(--cv-white);        /* card / panel */\n  --cv-bg-surface-2:   #FAFBFC;                /* nested surface */\n  --cv-bg-dark:        var(--cv-ink-deep);\n  --cv-bg-editorial:   var(--cv-parchment);\n\n  --cv-border:         #DCE1E8;\n  --cv-border-strong:  var(--cv-slate-200);\n  --cv-border-dark:    #1B2C40;                /* hairline on navy */\n\n  /* ---------- Type families ---------- */\n  --cv-font-display:   \"Sora\", \"Söhne\", \"Manrope\", \"Inter\", system-ui, -apple-system, \"Segoe UI\", sans-serif;\n  --cv-font-body:      \"Manrope\", \"Söhne\", \"Inter\", system-ui, -apple-system, \"Segoe UI\", sans-serif;\n  --cv-font-mono:      \"Geist Mono\", \"JetBrains Mono\", \"IBM Plex Mono\", ui-monospace, \"SFMono-Regular\", Menlo, monospace;\n\n  /* ---------- Type scale ----------\n     Scale is geared for medtech editorial: big, confident\n     headlines (often spanning multiple lines), and a body\n     that holds up at small caption sizes. */\n\n  --cv-fs-display-xl: 80px;   /* \"Behind every breath, a question.\" */\n  --cv-fs-display-l:  64px;\n  --cv-fs-display-m:  48px;   /* poster headline */\n  --cv-fs-h1:         36px;   /* slide headline */\n  --cv-fs-h2:         28px;\n  --cv-fs-h3:         22px;\n  --cv-fs-h4:         18px;\n  --cv-fs-body:       16px;\n  --cv-fs-small:      14px;\n  --cv-fs-caption:    12px;\n  --cv-fs-eyebrow:    12px;   /* uppercase, tracked */\n  --cv-fs-footnote:   10px;\n\n  --cv-lh-tight:      1.05;\n  --cv-lh-snug:       1.15;\n  --cv-lh-normal:     1.35;\n  --cv-lh-relaxed:    1.55;\n\n  --cv-tracking-eyebrow: 0.18em;\n  --cv-tracking-mono:    0.04em;\n  --cv-tracking-tight:   -0.01em;\n\n  /* ---------- Spacing scale ---------- */\n  --cv-s-1: 4px;\n  --cv-s-2: 8px;\n  --cv-s-3: 12px;\n  --cv-s-4: 16px;\n  --cv-s-5: 24px;\n  --cv-s-6: 32px;\n  --cv-s-7: 48px;\n  --cv-s-8: 64px;\n  --cv-s-9: 96px;\n  --cv-s-10: 128px;\n\n  /* ---------- Radii ----------\n     CorVista is mostly square / lightly-rounded. Pills are\n     reserved for FDA-cleared style badges. Cards use 6px. */\n  --cv-radius-xs: 2px;\n  --cv-radius-sm: 4px;\n  --cv-radius-md: 6px;\n  --cv-radius-lg: 10px;\n  --cv-radius-pill: 999px;\n\n  /* ---------- Shadows ----------\n     Soft, low-contrast lift. No floating-card shadows on dark\n     surfaces — use 1px border in --cv-border-dark instead. */\n  --cv-shadow-1: 0 1px 2px rgba(14, 31, 51, 0.04), 0 1px 3px rgba(14, 31, 51, 0.06);\n  --cv-shadow-2: 0 4px 12px rgba(14, 31, 51, 0.06), 0 1px 3px rgba(14, 31, 51, 0.04);\n  --cv-shadow-3: 0 12px 32px rgba(14, 31, 51, 0.10), 0 2px 6px rgba(14, 31, 51, 0.04);\n\n  /* ---------- Motion ---------- */\n  --cv-ease:           cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.7, 0.2, 1);   /* the house easing */\n  --cv-ease-out:       cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);\n  --cv-dur-fast:       150ms;\n  --cv-dur-base:       220ms;\n  --cv-dur-slow:       420ms;\n}\n\n/* =============================================================\n   Semantic resets — keep these scoped so they don't fight host\n   styles. Apply by adding `.cv-typography` to a root container,\n   or use directly on body for full-brand pages.\n   ============================================================= */\n\n.cv-typography,\n.cv-typography :where(p, h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, ul, ol, li, blockquote) {\n  font-family: var(--cv-font-body);\n  color: var(--cv-fg-1);\n}\n\n.cv-typography {\n  font-size: var(--cv-fs-body);\n  line-height: var(--cv-lh-relaxed);\n  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;\n  text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;\n}\n\n.cv-typography h1, .cv-display-l {\n  font-family: var(--cv-font-display);\n  font-weight: 600;\n  font-size: var(--cv-fs-display-l);\n  line-height: var(--cv-lh-tight);\n  letter-spacing: var(--cv-tracking-tight);\n  text-wrap: pretty;\n}\n\n.cv-typography h2, .cv-display-m {\n  font-family: var(--cv-font-display);\n  font-weight: 600;\n  font-size: var(--cv-fs-h1);\n  line-height: var(--cv-lh-snug);\n  letter-spacing: var(--cv-tracking-tight);\n  text-wrap: pretty;\n}\n\n.cv-typography h3 {\n  font-family: var(--cv-font-display);\n  font-weight: 600;\n  font-size: var(--cv-fs-h2);\n  line-height: var(--cv-lh-snug);\n}\n\n.cv-typography h4 {\n  font-family: var(--cv-font-display);\n  font-weight: 600;\n  font-size: var(--cv-fs-h3);\n  line-height: var(--cv-lh-snug);\n}\n\n.cv-typography p {\n  font-size: var(--cv-fs-body);\n  line-height: var(--cv-lh-relaxed);\n  color: var(--cv-fg-2);\n}\n\n/* Display-XL — the editorial poster headline (Tabloid 3 etc).\n   Often paired with one word italic for emphasis. */\n.cv-display-xl {\n  font-family: var(--cv-font-display);\n  font-weight: 600;\n  font-size: var(--cv-fs-display-xl);\n  line-height: var(--cv-lh-tight);\n  letter-spacing: -0.015em;\n  color: var(--cv-fg-1);\n  text-wrap: balance;\n}\n.cv-display-xl em {\n  font-style: italic;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  color: var(--cv-sky);\n}\n\n/* Eyebrow label — uppercase, mono, blue (very CorVista) */\n.cv-eyebrow {\n  font-family: var(--cv-font-mono);\n  font-size: var(--cv-fs-eyebrow);\n  font-weight: 500;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  letter-spacing: var(--cv-tracking-eyebrow);\n  color: var(--cv-sky);\n}\n\n/* Section label — bold tracked label sitting above a sky underline */\n.cv-section-label {\n  display: inline-block;\n  font-family: var(--cv-font-display);\n  font-size: 13px;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  letter-spacing: 0.14em;\n  color: var(--cv-sky);\n  border-bottom: 2px solid var(--cv-sky);\n  padding-bottom: 6px;\n}\n\n/* Mono caption — small print / footnotes in posters */\n.cv-mono {\n  font-family: var(--cv-font-mono);\n  font-size: var(--cv-fs-caption);\n  font-weight: 400;\n  letter-spacing: var(--cv-tracking-mono);\n  color: var(--cv-fg-2);\n}\n\n/* Stat — the big-number style (\"82%\", \"2.26 yrs\") */\n.cv-stat {\n  font-family: var(--cv-font-display);\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-size: 56px;\n  line-height: 1;\n  color: var(--cv-sky);\n  letter-spacing: -0.02em;\n}\n.cv-stat-unit {\n  font-size: 0.5em;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  color: var(--cv-sky);\n  margin-left: 2px;\n}\n<\u002Fstyle>\n  <style>\n    html, body { margin: 0; padding: 0; background: #0E1F33; overflow: hidden; }\n  <\u002Fstyle>\n<\u002Fhelmet>\n<x-import component-from-global-scope=\"MotionSquare\" from=\"249e77ce-3b7b-480d-b349-63b644fe6cbb#/animations.jsx\" hint-size=\"100%,100%\" style=\"position:fixed; inset:0;\"><\u002Fx-import>\n<\u002Fx-dc>\n\n\n<\u002Fbody><\u002Fhtml>"
  </script>
</body>
</html>
